evals.expected_output: A complete OrderServiceTest class with @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class), @Mock for all 3 dependencies, @InjectMocks for OrderService, and test methods covering: successful order placement, insufficient inventory, payment failure, order retrieval, not-found order, successful cancellation, and cancellation of shipped order. Tests should follow AAA pattern, use BDD-style naming, and use AssertJ.
expectations: Covers getOrder success and not-found paths
Covers cancelOrder on shipped order throws exception
Follows AAA pattern with blank line separation
Uses verify() to check interaction with mocks

evals.expected_output: A ProductControllerTest class annotated with @WebMvcTest(ProductController.class), using MockMvc @Autowired, @MockBean for ProductService, with tests for each endpoint (GET all with params, GET by ID, POST create, DELETE) covering both success and error cases.
expectations: Tests GET /api/products with pagination and category params
Tests POST /api/products with valid request body
Each test method includes throws Exception
Uses jsonPath for response body assertions

evals.expected_output: An OrderRepositoryTest class annotated with @DataJpaTest, using @Autowired for OrderRepository and TestEntityManager, with tests for derived queries (findByCustomerId, findByStatusAndCreatedAtAfter), @Query methods (findLargeOrdersByCustomer, countByStatus), pagination (findAllByCustomerId), and boolean check (existsByCustomerIdAndStatus).
expectations: Tests findByStatusAndCreatedAtAfter derived query with date
Uses persistAndFlush for test data setup
Each test method has BDD-style name
